message:
simplify: extract buildRequestBody helpers to deduplicate adapter body construction

Each adapter (Google, OpenAI, Anthropic) duplicated request body
construction between Complete() and Stream(). Extract into shared
buildRequestBody methods. Also extract setAnthropicHeaders for the
Anthropic adapter's duplicated header setup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
